---
title: "score_cohesion.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\sentinel\score_cohesion.py"
loc: 69
complexity: 6
logic_score: 7.60
style_score: 3.49
intel_score: 3.72
overall_score: 3.33
---

## Intent
The `score_cohesion.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on CohesionScorer, __init__, lexical_score, intent_score, run_audit, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via CohesionScorer, __init__, lexical_score, intent_score, run_audit, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.5/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.7/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 14 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [asyncio](file://asyncio)
- [argparse](file://argparse)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [typing](file://typing)
- [difflib](file://difflib)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.cstar.core.uplink](file://src.cstar.core.uplink)

### Exports
- `CohesionScorer`
- `__init__`
- `lexical_score`
- `intent_score`
- `run_audit`
- `main`
